stemHtml: A Visual Approach for an IFR flight can be performed when...

options.a: part or all of an instrument procedure is not completed and the approach is conducted in VMC.
options.b: during IFR and VFR approaches in VMC.
options.c: cloud base is 1000 ft above DA/MDA.
options.d: cloud base is 1000 ft above DA/MDA with reduced visibility.
